task: Find the most experienced real estate agent in St Augustine, FL, and open his or her profile page.
final_result_response: The task is complete. I found and opened the profile page of **Thomas Dorazil**, the most experienced RE/MAX real estate agent in St Augustine, FL, with **54 years of experience**. He is an Associate at RE/MAX Blue Coast, located at 2730 State Road 16, Unit 115, St Augustine, FL 32092. I found him by searching for agents in Saint Augustine, FL and sorting the results by "Experience (High to Low)," which placed him at the top of the 133 results.
